nodes.name: Log AI Usage: Refine Prompt with LLM

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $node["Get Book Context Cover"].json.primary_model || "gpt-4o", "max_tokens": 500, "temperature": $node["Get Book Context Cover"].json.temps.COVER_REFINEMENT || 0.7, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": $node["Get Book Context Cover"].json.prompts.COVER_REFINEMENT || "You are an expert at creating DALL-E 3 prompts for book covers." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Refine this book cover prompt for DALL-E 3 while preserving the instructions to include the title and author name as text:\n\n" + $json.prompt } ] } }}

parameters.query: SELECT b.*, s.value as primary_model, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.prompt_text) as prompts, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.temperature) as temps FROM books b CROSS JOIN (SELECT value FROM ai_settings WHERE key = 'primary_model') s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) name, prompt_text, temperature   FROM ai_prompts   WHERE is_active = true AND (genre = b.genre OR genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END OR genre = 'GENERAL')   ORDER BY name, (genre = b.genre) DESC, (genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END) DESC, created_at DESC) p ON true WHERE b.id = $1::uuid GROUP BY b.id, s.value

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": $node["Get Book Context Editor"].json.primary_model || "gpt-4o", "temperature": $node["Get Book Context Editor"].json.temps.EDITOR || 0.2, "max_tokens": 20000, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": ($node["Get Book Context Editor"].json.prompts.EDITOR || "Sei un Editor Letterario Professionale.") + "

CONTESTO LIBRO:
- Titolo: " + ($node["Get Book Context Editor"].json.title || 'In definizione') + "
- Blueprint: " + JSON.stringify($node["Get Book Context Editor"].json.context_data?.blueprint || {}) + "

TESTO DA REVISIONARE:
" + $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.content } ] } }}

parameters.query: SELECT b.*, s.value as primary_model, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.prompt_text) as prompts, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.temperature) as temps FROM books b CROSS JOIN (SELECT value FROM ai_settings WHERE key = 'primary_model') s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) name, prompt_text, temperature   FROM ai_prompts   WHERE is_active = true AND (genre = b.genre OR genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END OR genre = 'GENERAL')   ORDER BY name, (genre = b.genre) DESC, (genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END) DESC, created_at DESC) p ON true WHERE b.id = $1::uuid GROUP BY b.id, s.value

SELECT b.title as book_title, c.title as chapter_title, c.content, c.chapter_number FROM books b JOIN chapters c ON b.id = c.book_id WHERE b.id = $1::uuid AND c.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY c.chapter_number ASC;
UPDATE paragraphs SET content = $1, status = 'COMPLETED', actual_word_count = $3, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2::uuid

UPDATE books SET 
  plot_summary = $2, 
  target_chapters = $3, 
  context_data = jsonb_set(
    context_data, 
    '{messages}', 
    COALESCE(context_data->'messages', '[]'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('role', 'assistant', 'content', 'TRAMA GENERATA: ' || $2))
  )
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.primary_model || "gpt-4o", "temperature": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.temps.PLOT_ARCHITECT || 0.3, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.prompts.PLOT_ARCHITECT || "Prompt non trovato." }, { "role": "user", "content": "BLUEPRINT & CONCEPT:\n" + JSON.stringify($node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.context_data || {}) } ] } }}

parameters.query: SELECT string_agg(content, '\n\n' ORDER BY paragraph_number ASC) as combined_content FROM paragraphs WHERE chapter_id = $1::uuid AND paragraph_number < $2::integer AND status = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT b.*, s.value as primary_model, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.prompt_text) as prompts, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.temperature) as temps FROM books b CROSS JOIN (SELECT value FROM ai_settings WHERE key = 'primary_model') s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) name, prompt_text, temperature   FROM ai_prompts   WHERE is_active = true AND (genre = b.genre OR genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END OR genre = 'GENERAL')   ORDER BY name, (genre = b.genre) DESC, (genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END) DESC, created_at DESC) p ON true WHERE b.id = $1::uuid GROUP BY b.id, s.value

INSERT INTO books (id, title, author, genre, status, context_data, target_pages) 
VALUES (
  $1::uuid, 
  $2, 
  $3, 
  $4, 
  'INTERVIEW', 
  jsonb_build_object(
    'messages', CASE WHEN $5 IS NOT NULL AND $5 != '' THEN jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('role', 'user', 'content', $5)) ELSE '[]'::jsonb END,
    'target_pages', to_jsonb(COALESCE($6::integer, (SELECT target_pages FROM books WHERE id = $1::uuid)))
  ),
  COALESCE($6::integer, (SELECT target_pages FROM books WHERE id = $1::uuid))
) 
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET 
  title = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.title IS NOT NULL AND EXCLUDED.title NOT IN ('', 'Nuovo Libro', 'Nuovo Progetto') THEN EXCLUDED.title ELSE books.title END,
  author = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.author, books.author),
  genre = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.genre, books.genre),
  target_pages = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.target_pages, books.target_pages),
  context_data = jsonb_set(
    jsonb_set(
      books.context_data,
      '{target_pages}',
      COALESCE(EXCLUDED.context_data->'target_pages', books.context_data->'target_pages', to_jsonb(books.target_pages))
    ),
    '{messages}',
    COALESCE(books.context_data->'messages', '[]'::jsonb) || 
    CASE WHEN $5 IS NOT NULL AND $5 != '' THEN jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('role', 'user', 'content', $5)) ELSE '[]'::jsonb END
  )
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.bookId || $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.book_id }},{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.title || null }},{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.author || null }},{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.genre || null }},{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.userInput || null }},{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.targetPages || null }}

SELECT p.*, c.title AS chapter_title, c.summary AS chapter_summary, c.book_id FROM paragraphs p JOIN chapters c ON p.chapter_id = c.id WHERE ( ($2 = 'WRITE_CHAPTER_FROM_PLAN' AND p.chapter_id = $1::uuid AND COALESCE(p.status,'PENDING') != 'COMPLETED') OR ($2 <> 'WRITE_CHAPTER_FROM_PLAN' AND p.id = $1::uuid) ) ORDER BY p.paragraph_number ASC LIMIT 1

={{ { "model": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.primary_model || "gpt-4o", "temperature": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.temps.ARCHITECT || 0.3, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": $node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.prompts.ARCHITECT || "Prompt non trovato." }, { "role": "user", "content": "DATA:
BLUEPRINT: " + JSON.stringify($node["Get Book Context Concept Architect1"].json.context_data || {}) + "
PLOT: " + ($node["Sanitize Plot"].json.content || "") + "
TARGETS: " + JSON.stringify($node["Calculator"].json || {}) + "

FEEDBACK/INPUT: " + ($node["Webhook Router"].json.body.feedback ? $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.feedback : "Genera indice da zero.") } ] } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $node["Prepare Writer Payload"].json.model, "temperature": $node["Prepare Writer Payload"].json.temperature, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": $node["Prepare Writer Payload"].json.systemPrompt }, { "role": "user", "content": $node["Prepare Writer Payload"].json.userPrompt } ] } }}

parameters.query: UPDATE paragraphs p SET content = j.content, status = 'COMPLETED', actual_word_count = array_length(regexp_split_to_array(j.content, '\\s+'), 1) FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS j(paragraph_number int, content text) WHERE p.chapter_id = $2::uuid AND p.paragraph_number = j.paragraph_number

UPDATE chapters c SET content = chapter_data.compiled_content, actual_word_count = chapter_data.actual_word_count, status = 'COMPLETED', updated_at = NOW() FROM ( SELECT p.chapter_id, string_agg(COALESCE(p.content, ''), E'\n\n' ORDER BY p.paragraph_number ASC) AS compiled_content, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(p.actual_word_count, array_length(regexp_split_to_array(COALESCE(p.content, ''), '\\s+'), 1))), 0) AS actual_word_count FROM paragraphs p WHERE p.chapter_id = $1::uuid GROUP BY p.chapter_id ) AS chapter_data WHERE c.id = chapter_data.chapter_id

SELECT b.*, s.value as primary_model, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.prompt_text) as prompts, jsonb_object_agg(p.name, p.temperature) as temps FROM books b CROSS JOIN (SELECT value FROM ai_settings WHERE key = 'primary_model') s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) name, prompt_text, temperature   FROM ai_prompts   WHERE is_active = true AND (genre = b.genre OR genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END OR genre = 'GENERAL')   ORDER BY name, (genre = b.genre) DESC, (genre = CASE WHEN b.genre IN ('Saggistica Scientifica o Storica', 'Tecnologia e AI', 'Business & Self-Help', 'Hobby e Passioni', 'Salute, Dieta e Benessere', 'Finanza Personale e Investimenti', 'Biografie e Memorie') THEN 'Non-Fiction' ELSE 'Fiction' END) DESC, created_at DESC) p ON true WHERE b.id = $1::uuid GROUP BY b.id, s.value
UPDATE ai_requests SET status = 'completed', response_data = $1::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2::uuid
